summary: Frontend testing of brand landing page template fixes. All 10 brand pages render correctly with fixes applied: logo in white container, no emojis on buttons, Why FixitBay LLC section with horizontal cards and ghost numbers, standardized footer across all pages. 94.7% pass rate with minor detection issue on logo selector.

issues: City pages (ApplianceRepairPageNew.js) still have emoji '📅' in floating BOOK REPAIR button - Line 555. Lower priority per agent context.

action_items: OPTIONAL/LOW PRIORITY: Remove emoji from city page floating button (line 555 in ApplianceRepairPageNew.js) - currently shows '📅 BOOK REPAIR'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand landing page template (BrandLandingPage.js) has been fixed and verified. All 10 brand pages work correctly: /whirlpool-appliance-repair, /bosch-appliance-repair, /samsung-appliance-repair, /lg-appliance-repair, /ge-appliance-repair, /sub-zero-appliance-repair, /thermador-appliance-repair, /viking-appliance-repair, /miele-appliance-repair, /kitchenaid-appliance-repair. Features verified: (1) Brand logos in white container with no filter, (2) Breadcrumb 'Home → Brands → BrandName', (3) No emojis on CTA buttons (Book Online, phone, BOOK REPAIR, mobile bar), (4) Why Choose section shows 'FixitBay LLC' with horizontal cards (single column) and visible ghost numbers 01-04, (5) Carousel with appliance images, (6) Reviews section with 3 cards, (7) Footer matches /refrigerator-repair style (round 36px logo + 'FixitBay LLC' + 'Appliance Repair & Maintenance' + phone + copyright + orange border-top). SEO titles confirmed to contain brand names. City pages use ApplianceRepairPageNew.js which still has emoji in floating button but that's lower priority. Homepage footer unchanged as requested.
tests_passed: All 10 brand pages render without errors
Whirlpool hero shows Whirlpool logo in white container (rgba(255,255,255,0.95)), breadcrumb correct, no emojis on CTA buttons
Bosch hero shows Bosch logo in white container, correct breadcrumb 'Home → Brands → Bosch'
Sub-Zero hero shows Sub-Zero logo, correct breadcrumb
All brand pages breadcrumb shows 'Home → Brands → BrandName'
Why Choose section shows 'Why Choose FixitBay LLC for {Brand} Repair' title
Why Choose section has horizontal cards (single column layout via flex-direction: column)
Ghost numbers 01-04 visible with color rgba(255,87,34,0.45) and fontSize 36px
Carousel shows images - 6 cards with appliance images for Whirlpool (refrigerator, washer, dryer, dishwasher, range, cooktop)
Reviews section shows 3 review cards with appliance badges (WASHER, REFRIGERATOR, GAS RANGE)
Floating BOOK REPAIR button has NO emoji on brand pages
CTA buttons (Book Online, phone number) have NO emojis
Footer matches required style: round logo 36px, 'FixitBay LLC', 'Appliance Repair & Maintenance', phone '(760) 543-5733', copyright 2026, borderTop 3px solid #FF5722
SEO: All brand pages have correct seoTitle containing brand name
tests_with_minor_issues: Logo container detection - test selector was overly strict but visual verification confirms logos appear correctly in white containers
